text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, for sure. You could get a lot of use from it.
I think I'd go with brown, personally.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Aha! ☆ I had a feeling you would! Black for me.
Let's both get different colors!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sounds nice. Why don't we try them on?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (Wait, what?! Oh no! Are you kidding me?!)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What do you think? I quite like it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Weeell... It's nice, but... I might have to hold off
until, um... payday or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's a lot, huh? Let's come back together some
other time then.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I'm so tired... but just one more lap.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally gonna get back in shape. Then City
and I can match!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Tosen Jordan eventually hits her goal and
the skirt fits perfectly!
